rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type annexes for interface behavior; use implementation annexes for subcomponent bindings.
Ensure all identifiers in AGREE annexes are present in the AADL model's visible scope.
generic_rules: Use component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees that reference component ports.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not found in the analyzed AADL model.
Validate that all AGREE expressions reference only visible AADL features and types.
Avoid inserting implementation-specific bindings in component type contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Constants and equations in AGREE should use visible AADL identifiers.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes.
Do not assume numeric or Boolean encodings for event ports without explicit data values.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
Model analyst extraction of AADL structure
